creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi! 

This problem can be solved by setting in the /etc/make.conf: 

HEIMDAL_HOME=           /usr/local                                                                                                  

In general, having two versions of Kerberos in the system can 
create a lot of problems, so should be avoided. 

Hope, this would work. 

with regards, 
Timur.
